item.title: Interesting bits and bobs: 2020-08-14
item.description: Google Photos on iOS does not have a slideshow function! 😱 They did however roll out a new designed and killed off For You feature.

item.title: Links: 20th Sep
item.description: This week: technology links and some other interesting articles.
